table.f_alert_query:
select (case 
	when ifnull((select ngay_xuat from dsm_ve where id="{$id}"),"1")="" then "Lỗi.Ngày xuất vé không được trống." 
	when ifnull((select ten_hang from dsm_ve where id="{$id}"),"1")="" then "Lỗi.Hãng vé không được trống." 
	when ifnull((select so_ve from dsm_ve where id="{$id}"),"1")="" then "Lỗi.Số vé không được trống." 
	when ifnull((select ten_kh from dsm_ve where id="{$id}"),"1")="" then "Lỗi.Tên khách hàng không được trống." 
	when ifnull((select khach_hang from dsm_ve where id="{$id}"),"1")="" then "Lỗi.Khách hàng không được trống." 
	when (select cp_trungve from dsm_ve where  id ="{$id}")=1 	and 	
	(select count(ten_kh) from dsm_ve where id !="{$id}" and ten_kh="{$ten_kh}" and so_ve ="{$so_ve}" and ten_hang="{$ten_hang}")>0  then "Lỗi.Không thể xuất cùng số vé cho cùng 1 khách hàng."
	when (select cp_trungve from dsm_ve where  id ="{$id}")=0 	and 	
	(select count(so_ve) from dsm_ve where id !="{$id}" and so_ve ="{$so_ve}" and ten_hang="{$ten_hang}")>0  then "Lỗi.Trùng số vé."
else "" end) as msg

legacy_rows.trigger_value:
update dsm_ve set 
cp_trungve=(select cp_trung from dsm_hangve where id="#ten_hang"),
loai_ve="noidia",
gia_von_tigia=1,
gia_ban_tigia=1,
tax=thue_1+thue_2+thue_3+thue_4,
gia_von=gia_ve+thue_gtgt + tax,
loi_nhuan=round(gia_ban-gia_von,2),
CRT_USER="#uid#"
where id="#id"

insert into dsm_lichsu (ID, ten_nv, ten_hang, loai_ve, ten_ncc, so_ve, ten_kh, hanh_trinh, gia_ve, thue_gtgt, thue_1, thue_2, thue_3, thue_4, tax, gia_von, gia_von_hd, gia_von_tigia, gia_ban, gia_ban_hd, gia_ban_tigia, khach_hang, khach_quen, ghi_chu, ngay_ct, noi_dung)
	select concat(a.ID,"-",unix_timestamp()),"#uid#",ten_hang, loai_ve, ten_ncc, so_ve, ten_kh, hanh_trinh, gia_ve, thue_gtgt, thue_1, thue_2, thue_3, thue_4, tax,
	 gia_von, gia_von_hd, gia_von_tigia, gia_ban, gia_ban_hd, gia_ban_tigia, khach_hang, khach_quen, ghi_chu,date_format(now(),"%d/%m/%Y"),"Thêm 1 vé."
	from dsm_ve a 
	where ID="#ID" and so_ve !=""  and ten_kh !="" and khach_hang !=""

insert into dsm_lichsu (ID,ngay_ct,ten_nv,so_ve,ten_kh,noi_dung)
	select concat(ID,"-",unix_timestamp()),date_format(now(),"%d/%m/%Y"), "#uid#",so_ve,ten_kh,"Xóa 1 vé."
	from dsm_ve a 
	where ID="#ID"

update dsm_ve
set gia_von_hd=gia_von 
where id="#id" and gia_von_hd=0

update dsm_ve
set gia_von_hd=0
where id="#id"

update dsm_ve
set gia_ban_hd=gia_ban 
where id="#id" and gia_ban_hd=0

insert into dsm_lichsu (ID,ngay_ct,ten_nv,so_ve,ten_kh,noi_dung)
	select concat(ID,"-",unix_timestamp()),date_format(now(),"%d/%m/%Y"), "#uid#",so_ve,ten_kh,"Cập nhật 1 vé."
	from dsm_ve a 
	where ID="#ID" and CRT_USER !="#crt_user"
repair table dsm_ve
repair table dsm_lichsu

legacy_rows.trigger_value:
update dsm_re
set loai_ve="quocte",
ten_hang=(select ten_hang from dsm_ve where id="#so_ve"),
ten_ncc=(select ten_ncc from dsm_ve where id="#so_ve"),
ten_kh=(select ten_kh from dsm_ve where id="#so_ve"),
hanh_trinh=(select hanh_trinh from dsm_ve where id="#so_ve"),
gia_von=(select gia_von from dsm_ve where id="#so_ve"),
gia_ban=(select gia_ban from dsm_ve where id="#so_ve"),
gia_von_tigia = case when gia_von_tigia=0 then (select gia_von_tigia from dsm_ve where id="#so_ve") else gia_von_tigia end,
gia_ban_tigia = case when gia_ban_tigia=0 then (select gia_ban_tigia from dsm_ve where id="#so_ve") else gia_ban_tigia end
where id="#id"

update dsm_re
set gia_von_re = case when gia_von_re=0 then (gia_von-gia_von_chang-tax_von-phi_re_giavon) else gia_von_re end,
gia_ban_re = case when gia_ban_re=0 then (gia_ban-gia_ban_chang-tax_ban-phi_re_giaban) else gia_ban_re end
where id="#id"

update dsm_re
set gia_von_re = 0,
gia_ban_re = 0
where id="#id"
repair table dsm_re

update dsm_tour set so_ngay=(DATEDIFF(str_to_date(ngay_ve,"%d/%m/%Y"),str_to_date(ngay_di,"%d/%m/%Y"))) +1 where id="#id"

update dsm_tour
set bien_nhan =concat("In biên nhận ^main.php?nm=dsm_inbiennhan_tour&tp=0&uid=dongsam&app_id=vemaybay&rid=",id),
hoa_don =concat("In hóa đơn ^main.php?nm=dsm_inhoadon_ngtour&tp=0&uid=dongsam&app_id=vemaybay&rid=",id)
where id="#id"

update dsm_tour
	set ngay_lap_tour =date_format(now(),"%d/%m/%Y")
	where id ="#id" and ngay_lap_tour =""

update dsm_tour a inner join 
(select IFNULL(max(SUBSTRING_INDEX(so_ct_tour,".",-1)),0) as STT1 from dsm_tour where 
 DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(ngay_lap_tour,"%d/%m/%Y"),"%y%m%d")=SUBSTRING_INDEX(so_ct_tour,".",1) 
 and DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(ngay_lap_tour,"%d/%m/%Y"),"%y%m%d")=DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE("#ngay_lap_tour","%d/%m/%Y"),"%y%m%d")
 and ID<>"#ID"
)b on 1=1  inner join 
(select count(so_ct_tour) as STT2 from dsm_tour where 
 DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(ngay_lap_tour,"%d/%m/%Y"),"%y%m%d")=SUBSTRING_INDEX(so_ct_tour,".",1) 
  and DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(ngay_lap_tour,"%d/%m/%Y"),"%y%m%d")=DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE("#ngay_lap_tour","%d/%m/%Y"),"%y%m%d")
  and ID<>"#ID"
)c on 1=1
left join (select ID,so_ct_tour from dsm_tour)d on a.so_ct_tour=d.so_ct_tour and a.ID<>d.ID
set a.so_ct_tour=concat(DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(ngay_lap_tour,"%d/%m/%Y"),"%y%m%d"),".",LPAD((case when STT1*1>STT2*1 then STT1 else STT2 end)+1,3,"0"))
where a.ID="#ID" and (DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(ngay_lap_tour,"%d/%m/%Y"),"%y%m%d")<>SUBSTRING_INDEX(a.so_ct_tour,".",1) 
or (ngay_lap_tour<>"" and a.so_ct_tour="")  or a.so_ct_tour=d.so_ct_tour or a.so_ct_tour=SUBSTRING_INDEX(a.so_ct_tour,".",1))
repair table dsm_tour

update dsm_tour_banle_ct a inner join 
(select IFNULL(max(SUBSTRING_INDEX(so_ct,".",-1)),0) as STT1 from dsm_tour_banle_ct where 
 DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(ngay_dat,"%d/%m/%Y"),"%y%m%d")=SUBSTRING_INDEX(so_ct,".",1) 
 and DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(ngay_dat,"%d/%m/%Y"),"%y%m%d")=DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE("#ngay_dat","%d/%m/%Y"),"%y%m%d")
 and ID<>"#ID"
)b on 1=1  inner join 
(select count(so_ct) as STT2 from dsm_tour_banle_ct where 
 DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(ngay_dat,"%d/%m/%Y"),"%y%m%d")=SUBSTRING_INDEX(so_ct,".",1) 
  and DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(ngay_dat,"%d/%m/%Y"),"%y%m%d")=DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE("#ngay_dat","%d/%m/%Y"),"%y%m%d")
  and ID<>"#ID"
)c on 1=1
left join (select ID,so_ct from dsm_tour_banle_ct)d on a.so_ct=d.so_ct and a.ID<>d.ID
set a.so_ct=concat(DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(ngay_dat,"%d/%m/%Y"),"%y%m%d"),".",LPAD((case when STT1*1>STT2*1 then STT1 else STT2 end)+1,3,"0"))
where a.ID="#ID" and (DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(ngay_dat,"%d/%m/%Y"),"%y%m%d")<>SUBSTRING_INDEX(a.so_ct,".",1) 
or (ngay_dat<>"" and a.so_ct="")  or a.so_ct=d.so_ct or a.so_ct=SUBSTRING_INDEX(a.so_ct,".",1))
repair table dsm_tour_banle_ct
repair table dsm_phieuthu_tour
repair table dsm_phieuchi_tour

in_biennhan=case when ch_kt=1 then concat("In BN ^main.php?nm=dsm_inbiennhan_tour_bl&tp=0&uid=dongsam&app_id=vemaybay&rid=",khach_hang) else "" end
where id="#id"

update dsm_tour_banle_ct a inner join 
(select IFNULL(max(SUBSTRING_INDEX(so_ct,".",-1)),0) as STT1 from dsm_tour_banle_ct where 
 DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(ngay_dat,"%d/%m/%Y"),"%y%m%d")=SUBSTRING_INDEX(so_ct,".",1) 
 and DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(ngay_dat,"%d/%m/%Y"),"%y%m%d")=DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE("#ngay_dat","%d/%m/%Y"),"%y%m%d")
 and ID<>"#ID"
)b on 1=1  inner join 
(select count(so_ct) as STT2 from dsm_tour_banle_ct where 
 DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(ngay_dat,"%d/%m/%Y"),"%y%m%d")=SUBSTRING_INDEX(so_ct,".",1) 
  and DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(ngay_dat,"%d/%m/%Y"),"%y%m%d")=DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE("#ngay_dat","%d/%m/%Y"),"%y%m%d")
  and ID<>"#ID"
)c on 1=1
left join (select ID,so_ct from dsm_tour_banle_ct)d on a.so_ct=d.so_ct and a.ID<>d.ID
set a.so_ct=concat(DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(ngay_dat,"%d/%m/%Y"),"%y%m%d"),".",LPAD((case when STT1*1>STT2*1 then STT1 else STT2 end)+1,3,"0"))

where id="#id"

insert into dsm_phieuthu_tour(ID,so_biennhan,code_dichvu, ten_kh, noi_dung, ngay_di, ngay_ve, gia_ban, ti_gia,
                               thanh_tien, tam_thu, ngay_tamthu, phai_thu, ngay_thu, tien_mat, ghi_chu)
	select ID,parent_id, code_dichvu, ten_kh, noi_dung, ngay_di, ngay_ve, gia_ban, ti_gia, thanh_tien, tam_thu, ngay_tamthu, phai_thu, ngay_thu, tien_mat, ghi_chu
	from dsm_biennhantour_ct where id="#id" and da_thu=1

repair table dsm_biennhantour_ct
